title: Kubernetes vs. OpenShift: Choosing DevOps and CI/CD Workflows
summary: IBM Technology video comparing Kubernetes and OpenShift for DevOps and CI/CD workflows. The content examines how platform choices shape deployment pipelines, operations, and delivery speed in container environments.
